query:
-- How many services does ASG Hail have, and what is the source of the $1,837.08 revenue?
SELECT s.externalId, s.planName, s.monthlyRevenue, s.monthlyCost, s.costSource, s.billingItemId
FROM services s
WHERE s.customerExternalId = (SELECT externalId FROM customers WHERE name LIKE '%ASG Hail%' LIMIT 1)
ORDER BY s.monthlyRevenue DESC
LIMIT 20;

WHERE s.customerExternalId = (SELECT externalId FROM customers WHERE name LIKE '%ASG Hail%' LIMIT 1)
